use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING HUMAN SMALLPOX DISEASE

indications.text:
8.3 Females and Males of Reproductive Potential
1.1 Treatment of Human Smallpox Disease
8.4 Pediatric Use
1.2 Limitations of Use
8.5 Geriatric Use

1.1 Treatment of Human Smallpox Disease
TEMBEXA® is indicated for the treatment of human smallpox disease caused by variola virus in adult
and pediatric patients, including neonates.
1.2 Limitations of Use
TEMBEXA is not indicated for the treatment of diseases other than human smallpox disease
